data.heading: Current Projects
data.description: Ongoing research initiatives and clinical studies.

items.title: Cortical Thickness & Social Isolation
items.description: Longitudinal fMRI study mapping neural changes in response to prolonged social isolation, with implications for remote-work mental health.

items.title: Bias Remediation in Clinical Diagnostics
items.description: Developing AI-assisted screening tools that reduce implicit bias in preliminary psychological assessments.

items.title: The Resilience Index
items.description: A standardized metric for quantifying cognitive load-bearing capacity using wearable biometric data.

items.title: Neurodiversity & Workplace Design
items.description: Cross-institutional study on environmental stressors and productivity across neurotypes in high-pressure environments.
